title: Carrier Juke
description: Defender charges straight at carrier. Carrier cuts sideways or uses geometry to cause the defender to overcommit. Defender must lose relevance for a short window — no magnetic tracking.

expected_outcomes.description: Defender's charge carries them past or away from the carrier, opening a window.
Carrier has a brief window of reduced threat — not immunity, just a gap.

must_not_outcomes.description: Defender auto-corrects direction perfectly and the juke produces no meaningful separation.

notes: Jukes are map-geometry-dependent. Slam Dunk platforms and Bloodbowl open field produce different juke windows.
